mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_file_version (id, document_id, branch_id, file_id, version, change_log, uploaded_by, upload_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{documentId}, #{branchId}, #{fileId}, #{version}, #{changeLog}, #{uploadedBy}, #{uploadTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM document_file_version WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY upload_time DESC
SELECT * FROM document_file_version WHERE branch_id = #{branchId} ORDER BY upload_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM document_file_version WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY upload_time ASC LIMIT 1
DELETE FROM document_file_version WHERE branch_id = #{branchId} ORDER BY upload_time ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document_file_version WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document_file_version WHERE branch_id = #{branchId}
